sections.cool_stuff:
### Cool Stuff & Try This
**[ChatGPT as Your Weekend Planner: Tom's Guide]**
ChatGPT, that free AI chatbot you've probably heard of, can now act like an agent – a smart helper that does tasks beyond just answering questions, like planning errands and even booking real appointments. It's cool because it turns overwhelming to-do lists into easy steps, saving time for fun stuff like gaming or hanging out. Teens juggling school and chores should try it – imagine it organizing your homework schedule
sections.quick_bits:
### Quick Bits
**[AI Spots "Spilled Energy" in Hallucinations]**
When AI models hallucinate – that's when they make up facts that aren't true – they leave detectable math traces, and researchers found a way to spot them without extra training. This is cool because it could make AI chats more reliable for homework or trivia, like ensuring your answers aren't invented.
Source: https://the-decoder.com/when-language-models-hallucinate-they-leave-spilled-energy-in-their-own-math/
